items.headline: Bucks Reportedly Open to Giannis Antetokounmpo Trade Offers
items.summary: The Milwaukee Bucks are reportedly open to trade calls and offers for two-time MVP Giannis Antetokounmpo, with sources indicating a robust market is expected. This comes after a disappointing 32-50 season for Milwaukee, prompting the organization to consider options ahead of the NBA Draft.

items.headline: Thunder Sweep Lakers; LeBron James Undecided on Future
items.summary: The Oklahoma City Thunder completed a dominant 4-0 sweep of the Los Angeles Lakers with a 115-110 victory in Game 4 of their second-round series. Following the elimination, LeBron James, after his unprecedented 23rd season, is contemplating whether to return for a 24th NBA season. Luka Doncic also confirmed he was not close to returning from his hamstring injury during the Lakers' playoff run.

items.headline: Washington Wizards Win 2026 NBA Draft Lottery
items.summary: The Washington Wizards have secured the first overall pick in the 2026 NBA Draft after winning the draft lottery. The Utah Jazz, Memphis Grizzlies, and Chicago Bulls round out the top four.

items.headline: Thunder complete sweep over Lakers!
items.summary: The Oklahoma City Thunder finished their second-round series, sweeping the Los Angeles Lakers 4-0 with a 115-110 victory in Game 4.

items.headline: Mitchell's explosive second half ties Cavs-Pistons series!
items.summary: Donovan Mitchell's incredible second-half performance fueled the Cleveland Cavaliers to a 112-103 win over the Detroit Pistons, tying their Eastern Conference Semifinals series at 2-2.

items.headline: Upcoming Games: May 12, 2026
items.summary: The San Antonio Spurs host the Minnesota Timberwolves for Game 5 of their Western Conference Semifinals, with the series currently tied at 2-2.

items.headline: Mitchell's Historic Outburst
items.statContext: Donovan Mitchell led the Cavaliers with 43 points, including a playoff record-tying 39 points in the second half, against the Pistons.

items.headline: SGA Leads Thunder Sweep
items.statContext: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander dominated with 35 points and 8 assists, guiding the Thunder to a sweep over the Lakers.

items.headline: LeBron's Final Stand
items.statContext: LeBron James posted 24 points and 14 rebounds in what could be his final game of the season, as the Lakers were eliminated by the Thunder.

items.headline: Harden's Playoff Double-Double
items.statContext: James Harden recorded his 40th playoff double-double with 24 points and 11 assists for the Cavaliers against the Pistons.

items.headline: LeBron James Contemplates NBA Future
items.summary: Following the Lakers' playoff exit, LeBron James has not made a decision on whether he will return for his 24th NBA season. This uncertainty will be a major storyline heading into the offseason.

items.headline: Lakers Eye Big Offseason Moves After Early Exit
items.summary: With their season concluded, the Los Angeles Lakers are reportedly preparing for significant moves this summer, with ample cap space available. Key decisions loom regarding unrestricted free agents like Austin Reaves.

items.headline: Injury Updates: Huerter, Doncic, Williams
items.summary: The Detroit Pistons' Kevin Huerter is listed with an undisclosed injury. Luka Doncic of the Lakers was out with a hamstring injury and confirmed he wasn't close to returning before their elimination. Oklahoma City's Jalen Williams is also dealing with a hamstring injury.
